# REQ-SYS-048: Tire pressure alert shall trigger below 1.8 bar

## ASIL Level
A

## Description
Tire pressure alert shall trigger below 1.8 bar.

## Rationale
ISO 26262-3:2018, clause 5-5.4.2 — safety goal SG-TI-01 requires timely functional safety response.

## Verification Method
Back-to-back test comparing sensor input vs. actuator output.

## Traceability
- Up: REQ-SYS-047 (system_requirement)
- Down: None
